hero.title: Fullstack Developer
hero.tagline: Building systems that scale. Clean architecture, clear code.

about.label: Message
about.headline: I care about **craft** and **impact**—what we build and how it holds up. Quality code, clear architecture, systems that **scale**.
about.body: I focus on clean architecture, SOLID principles, and maintainable software. TypeScript, React, Node.js—and systems that last. I like to ship, iterate, and leave codebases better than I found them.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.subtitle: Open to the right projects and teams—freelance or full-time. If you care about architecture and quality, we'll get along.
